prompts.label: Explain React re-render bug
prompts.prompt: Explain why a React component re-renders when an inline object prop is recreated on every render. Keep technical terms exact. Show the fix with useMemo and mention shallow comparison.

prompts.label: Fix auth middleware token expiry
prompts.prompt: Fix auth middleware token expiry bug. Do not change the API contract. Keep the current error message exactly the same. The likely bug is that token expiry uses < instead of <=. Update tests around the boundary case and do not introduce a database migration.

prompts.label: Set up PostgreSQL connection pool
prompts.prompt: Set up a PostgreSQL connection pool for a service. Keep environment variable names exactly the same. Do not change the health check path `/healthz`. Verify staging before production deploy. Risk: older workers still expect `DATABASE_URL`.

prompts.label: Explain git rebase vs merge
prompts.prompt: Explain git rebase vs merge for a backend repository. Prefer rg for search. Avoid destructive git commands unless explicitly requested. Preserve the existing API response shape in backend refactors.

prompts.label: Review PR for security issues
prompts.prompt: Findings: src/auth/session.ts may leak stale auth state after partial invalidation. Keep the external API unchanged. Add a regression test for concurrent invalidation. Risk: admin dashboards currently rely on the old session-miss metric shape.

prompts.label: Refactor callback to async/await
prompts.prompt: Refactor a callback-based data fetch helper to async/await. Keep behavior unchanged. Preserve exact error handling semantics. Add tests for timeout and partial failure handling.

prompts.label: Architecture: microservices vs monolith
prompts.prompt: Explain microservices vs monolith tradeoffs for a backend team. Keep the comparison concise but technically precise. Mention deployment complexity, team autonomy, debugging complexity, and operational overhead.

prompts.label: Docker multi-stage build
prompts.prompt: Explain a Docker multi-stage build for a Node service. Keep commands exact where relevant. Mention build stage, runtime stage, smaller image size, and dependency isolation.

prompts.label: Debug PostgreSQL race condition
prompts.prompt: Current status: PostgreSQL race-condition investigation is in src/db/lock.ts. Repro still exists under concurrent writes only. Unit tests pass; integration tests not run yet. Do not change transaction semantics. Next steps: capture one failing trace, run integration tests, then compare lock ordering.

prompts.label: Implement React error boundary
prompts.prompt: Implement a React error boundary for a dashboard page. Keep public props unchanged. Preserve the existing design system. Add a smoke test for fallback rendering and a regression test for reset behavior.

prompts.label: Refactor payments retry helper
prompts.prompt: Refactor the payments client to isolate retry logic into a single helper. Keep public method names unchanged. Keep the current 429 error message unchanged. Add unit coverage for timeout and 429 retry behavior.

prompts.label: Update navigation layout guardrails
prompts.prompt: Update the navigation layout in src/ui/nav/layout.tsx. Preserve the existing design system. Keep keyboard navigation behavior unchanged. Add a smoke test for the compact mobile drawer state.

prompts.label: CSV parser handoff
prompts.prompt: Current status: CSV parser patch is in src/parser/csv.ts. Repro still exists on one legacy fixture only. Unit tests pass; integration tests not run yet. Do not change CSV output shape. Next steps: capture the failing fixture, run integration tests, then compare delimiter normalization.

prompts.label: Cache invalidation review
prompts.prompt: Findings: src/cache/session_store.ts may retain stale session entries after partial invalidation. Keep the external API unchanged. Add a regression test for concurrent invalidation. Risk: admin dashboards currently rely on the old cache-miss metric shape.

prompts.label: Bun repo rules
prompts.prompt: This repository uses Bun for scripts, not npm. Prefer rg for search. Avoid destructive git commands unless explicitly requested. Preserve the existing API response shape in backend refactors.
